texto: Yeah, it always amazes me how quickly people turn into good little socialists when they run out of their stuff. As long as they have something, it's theirs. Let them run out, and you need to share.
explicacao: Citação de A. American sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Yeah, it always amazes me how quickly people turn into good little socialists when they run out o…” articula reflexao, socialism, always em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
